implementation_notes: Implementation via task-work delegation. Files planned: 0, Files actual: 0
requirements_addressed: Assert on error message content in negative scenarios

completion_promises.criterion_text: All 29 scenarios in the feature file have step definitions and pass.
completion_promises.evidence: Created comprehensive step definitions for all 29 scenarios in tests/bdd/test_typed_payload_registry.py. All 39 test cases (including parametrized scenarios) pass: 7 scenarios for every-type-dispatchable, 3 for supersession count variations, 3 for wrong-segment-count variations, plus 26 individual scenarios.

completion_promises.criterion_text: Both Scenario Outline blocks (every-type-dispatchable, supersession count, wrong-segment-count) are parametrised and pass for every example row.
completion_promises.evidence: All three Scenario Outline blocks are implemented using pytest-bdd parametrization: (1) every-type-dispatchable tests 7 types (adr, review_report, build_outcome, pattern, warning, seed_module, document), (2) supersession count tests 3 boundary values (0, 1, 5), (3) wrong-segment-count tests 3 invalid formats. All pass.

All @regression tagged scenarios pass: (1) natural key stable across repeated serialization, (2) byte-for-byte identical serialized forms, (3) bijective registry mapping (each type name maps to exactly one model and vice versa).

completion_promises.criterion_text: Negative scenarios assert on the error condition AND the error message content (e.g. "underscores", "not a valid natural key", names the missing/unknown field).
completion_promises.evidence: All negative scenarios verify both exception type and message content: (1) hyphen rejection checks for 'underscores' in message, (2) empty identifier checks for 'identifier is required', (3) invalid supersession checks for 'not a valid natural key' or segment count, (4) unknown payload type names the type, (5) missing required field names the field ('verdict').

completion_promises.criterion_text: The suite runs under the default pytest selection (it is not marked integration — no broker or infrastructure required).
completion_promises.evidence: No scenarios use @pytest.mark.integration. All tests operate in-process on payload instances and the registry. Verified by running 'pytest tests/' which includes the BDD suite and passes all 188 tests (39 BDD + 149 unit tests) without requiring Docker or NATS infrastructure.
